questions.text: Which of the following describes a key bottleneck related to Sliding Window?
options: Inefficient scaling of TCP flow control sliding window, sender/receiver buffers calculations, and Silly Window Syndrome.
questions.correct_answer: Inefficient scaling of TCP flow control sliding window, sender/receiver buffers calculations, and Silly Window Syndrome.
questions.explanation: The topic covers how TCP flow control sliding window, sender/receiver buffers calculations, and Silly Window Syndrome scales under concurrent workloads, which represents the primary bottlenecks.
